info.title: Tech Stack Detector API
info.description: Tech Stack Detector API. Detect website technologies from HTML, scripts, meta tags, cookies, and response headers. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Detect website technologies from HTML, scripts, meta tags, cookies, and response headers.

url.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS website URL to analyze.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
